response.overview: Welcome to Birdworld, a beautifully colorful city filled with - you guessed it - BIRDS. From Magpies to Warblers to the Oh-So-Majestic Chicken, this place will fill all your feathery needs. Join Crow when he gets an early morning call to rescue his best friend, Chicken, from a wild night on the town.
response.title: Welcome to Birdworld
